GitHub Token Required
Safiih uses Llama-3.3-70B via GitHub Models — free, fast, great Urdu. No download needed.
Get your free token:
1. Go to github.com/settings/tokens
2. Click Generate new token (classic)
3. Check ✓ models:read — nothing else
4. Copy & paste below ✦
Saved only in your browser · Never sent anywhere except GitHub
